content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch encode, encode_ordinary possibly. Let me know if you're touching core.py too.

agent2: my change only adds a 'transformers' param to encode() signature + a short block at the top of the function body that transforms text before encoding. I won't touch allowed_special/disallowed_special logic or the core_bpe calls. Should be a small diff - let me know your return_positions diff shape so we can merge cleanly, or I can go first and you rebase on top.
